summary: V7-F-A H2 framing maintained (zero ERR_HTTP2_PROTOCOL_ERROR). SPA fetched /rest/thread/<UUID> with explicit query parameter with_schematized_response=true, server returned 1450 bytes (~1.4KB, on target with V7-F-A spec ~1.1KB). However the answer panel did NOT hydrate — empty mainText, no warning bubble, no Korean warning text in DOM. This is the escalation case for V7-F-B (blocks[] wrapper).

comparison_vs_710.710_v7e: H2 framing OK but minimal entries[].text not consumed by SPA, empty answer panel
comparison_vs_710.711_v7fa: H2 framing still OK, schematized_response wrapper sent (1450B), SPA still does not hydrate answer panel
comparison_vs_710.delta: shape upgraded from minimal entries[].text to schematized_response.answer_modes[0].answer.markdown + parent_info:null + root-level answer + assistant.status=completed; SPA continues to ignore
comparison_vs_710.h2_regression: NO regression — both 710 and 711 have zero H2 errors
comparison_vs_710.hydration_regression: NO improvement — answer panel still empty

recommendation: Escalate to V7-F-B blocks[] wrapper. Current SPA build appears to require entries[i].blocks[] array structure (likely answer_modes block + markdown_block) rather than the schematized_response wrapper. Inspect the V7-C SSE response (5287B sse/perplexity_ask) for the actual successful shape used by the streaming path — its block structure should be replicated in the thread fetch intercept.
